    use alloy_primitives::Address;
    use ethabi::{ethereum_types::U256 as EthU256, Address as EthAddress, Token};

    fn create_llm_request_payload(
        executor: Address,
        ttl: u64,
        model: &str,
        messages_json: &str,
    ) -> Vec<u8> {
        ethabi::encode(&[
            Token::Address(EthAddress::from_slice(executor.as_slice())),
            Token::Array(vec![]), // encrypted_secrets
            Token::Uint(EthU256::from(ttl)),
            Token::Array(vec![]),                     // secret_signature
            Token::Bytes(vec![]),                     // user_public_key
            Token::String(messages_json.to_string()), // messages_json
            Token::String(model.to_string()),         // model
            Token::Int(EthU256::from(0u64)),          // frequency_penalty
            Token::String(String::new()),             // logit_bias_json
            Token::Bool(false),                       // logprobs
            Token::Int(EthU256::from(100u64)),        // max_completion_tokens
